posts.title: ComfyUI + WAN 2.1 vs Cloud AI: Custom Pipeline Wins for Complex 3D Abstract Renders
posts.summary: 比較了自定義 ComfyUI 工作流與雲端 AI 渲染引擎（Seedance 2.0、Kling AI、Weavy、Higgsfield AI）處理複雜 3D 抽象幾何的能力。使用 WAN 2.1 結合 ControlNet（Depth 和 Canny 映射）從 Cinema 4D、Blender 或 After Effects 的原始 3D 導出創建可靠的照片級渲染，在處理玻璃水箱立方體等抽象幾何時，相比雲端黑盒子能更好地保持物理細節（如離心力導致的水晃動）和 360 度旋轉時的體積。
posts.why_important: 展示了針對複雜 3D 抽象內容，自定義本地工作流相比通用雲端 AI 服務的明確優勢，為需要精確控制物理和幾何的創作者提供了可行路徑。
posts.learnings: 使用 ControlNet 與 Depth 和 Canny 映射建立從 3D 導出到照片級渲染的可靠橋樑，能比雲端 AI（主要為人物和電影鏡頭優化）更好地處理抽象幾何和複雜物理細節。

author.name: Artemii Pogodin
author.headline: Motion Designer & AI Workflow Specialist | 3D & 2D | After Effects, Blender, C4D | UK Global Talent Visa

_original.content:
The Battle for the Best AI Render Engine & Breakdown:
Why personal workflows beat cloud giants 🤖🥊

When it comes to AI video generation, the biggest tradeoff is usually control versus convenience. In this breakdown of my experimental project, I put a custom ComfyUI pipeline head-to-head with Seedance 2.0, Kling AI, Weavy, and Higgsfield AI to test how different models handle complex 3D abstractions.

The main issue with cloud-based "black boxes" is that they are primarily optimized for human characters and cinematic shots. When you give them abstract geometry like this glass aquarium cube, they often struggle with the physics. This can lead to flickering, artifacts, and a loss of volume during 360-degree rotations.

🏆 The clear winner for this specific task is a custom WAN 2.1🥇 workflow. Using ControlNet with Depth and Canny maps creates a reliable bridge from raw 3D exports in Cinema 4d, Blender, or After Effects to a photorealistic render. It allows for a level of precision that is currently hard to achieve with one-click generations.

In this breakdown, you can see how a personalized pipeline preserves complex details like the water sloshing inside the ice head due to centrifugal force. Credits to Mick Mahler for the workflow and VACE logic and that makes this level of control possible.
Check out the side-by-side comparison in the video. Are you leaning more toward cloud solutions right now, or building out local workflows? Let's discuss below! 👇

#MotionDesign #AI #ComfyUI #3DRender #VFX #Breakdown #MotionGraphics #KlingAI #Seedance #Weavy #Higgsfield #AfterEffects #Houdini #Blender3D

posts.title: Blender + ComfyUI + SkyReels V3/Wan VACE: Skip UV Unwrapping, Get AI-Driven Textures & FX
posts.summary: 受 Mickmumpitz 工作流啟發，結合 Blender 原始渲染與 ComfyUI + SkyReels V3 和 Wan VACE 模型合併進行電影攝影處理。在 Blender 中搭建場景、鏡頭運動和基本幾何（無紋理、無精細燈光），對單幀進行外觀開發後，AI 接管生成逼真的模擬和紋理，這些紋理會固定在幾何體上，免去 UV 展開、動態 FX 和即時風格切換的傳統流程。
posts.why_important: 將傳統 3D 管線的繁瑣步驟（UV 展開、紋理繪製、FX 模擬）轉移給 AI，讓藝術家專注於創意構圖和鏡頭運動。
posts.learnings: 在 Blender 中創建基礎幾何和鏡頭運動，通過 ComfyUI 使用 SkyReels V3 + Wan VACE 模型合併，AI 會生成固定在幾何體上的紋理和 FX，繞過 UV 展開和手動 FX 工作。

author.name: Yossi Refaeli
author.headline: Engineering Mindset & Visual ai Design @ Reality Labs

_original.content:
I’ve been experimenting with a local pipeline that feels a bit like cheating.

Inspired by the workflow shared by Mickmumpitz, combine raw Blender renders and cinematography using ComfyUI and the SkyReels V3 + Wan VACE model merge.

The traditional 3D pipeline is great, but sometimes you just want to play Digital Puppet Theater and let the AI be your VFX department.

The Workflow 
The Skeleton (Blender) I block out the scene, camera moves, and basic geometry. No textures, no fancy lighting just the raw clay. 

I run a Look Dev pass on a single frame to dial in the vibe before committing to a full render.

The AI takes my 3D blueprint and fills in the rest generating realistic simulation and textures that stay pinned to my geometry.

Why this is a game changer
Zero UV Unwrapping, Dynamic FX for Free, Instant Style Swaps

posts.title: Graphic-Design-Bench (GDB): 首個專業平面設計 AI 評測基準，49 任務僅 2 個被解決
posts.summary: 發布了 Graphic-Design-Bench (GDB)，首個針對專業平面設計任務評估 AI 的綜合基準，包含 49 個任務，涵蓋 5 個類別：佈局（空間推理、組件檢測、圖層排序）、排版（字體、大小、粗細、顏色、間距）、信息圖表（SVG 理解、編輯、矢量生成）、模板語義（意圖分類、模板變體）和動畫（關鍵幀、運動類型、軌跡生成）。測試了 Google、OpenAI 和 Anthropic 的最先進閉源模型，發現 49 個任務中僅 2 個被解決，22 個任務完全未解決，即使解決的任務精度也不足以用於真實設計工作流。
posts.why_important: 揭示了當前頂級 AI 模型在專業設計任務上的實際局限性，為設計師提供了關於 AI 能力邊界的數據驅動洞察。
posts.learnings: 當前最先進的 AI 模型（GPT-4、Claude、Gemini）在佈局空間推理、排版精度、SVG 矢量生成和動畫關鍵幀等專業設計任務上仍遠未達到實用水平，設計師不應過度依賴 AI 完成複雜設計任務。

_original.content:
Today we're releasing Graphic-Design-Bench (GDB) - the first comprehensive benchmark for evaluating AI on professional graphic design tasks.

49 tasks. 
5 categories. 
7 frontier models. 

The 5 domains we test: 
🖼️ Layout: spatial reasoning, component detection, layer ordering 
✍️ Typography: font, size, weight, color, spacing 
📊 Infographics: SVG understanding, editing, vector generation
 🎨 Template Semantics: intent classification, template variants 
🎬 Animation: keyframes, motion types, trajectory generation

We tested against state of the art closed source models from Google, OpenAI and Anthropic.

→ Only 2 of 49 tasks are solved 
→ 22 tasks remain completely unsolved 
and the ones that aren't? Still too imprecise to be useful in any real design workflow. 
Paper and Github link in comments.

posts.title: Claude + Seedance 2.0: Custom System Prompt Creates Weighted Fight Choreography
posts.summary: 測試了專為 Seedance 2.0 構建的自定義 Claude 系統提示，用於生成具有重量感的打鬥場景。Claude 在結構化運動和時間控制方面的表現優於其他 AI 視頻提示工具，生成的動作具有連貫性和流暢的編排，而非常見的 AI 亂揮。通過與 Claude 協作進行藝術指導，創建了高質量的 AI 生成視頻。
posts.why_important: 展示了通過精心設計的系統提示，AI 可以生成具有專業水準的動作編排，而非隨機運動，為 AI 視頻創作者提供了提升輸出質量的具體方法。
posts.learnings: 使用為 Seedance 2.0 定制的 Claude 系統提示，專注於結構化運動和時間控制，可以生成具有重量感和連貫性的打鬥編排，優於通用 AI 視頻提示方法。

author.name: Aaron Randall
author.headline: Visual AI Artist & AI Filmmaker | 20+ Years in Concept Art, Illustration & Design | Educator

_original.content:
I never thought I'd say this but Claude might be the best fight choreographer I've ever worked with in the Ai space.

I've been testing a custom system prompt I built specifically for Seedance 2.0 and the results are kind of ridiculous. The fight scene I created has weight to it. The movements connect. The choreography actually flows like someone thought about it instead of the usual AI flailing we've all seen.

In my experience Claude writes better prompts for AI video than anything else out there. There's something about how it structures motion and timing that just clicks. Pair that with Seedance 2.0 and you've got a dynamic duo that punches way above what you'd expect from AI generated video right now.

Directing and collaborating with Claude has been one of the more efficient and enjoyable parts of my workflow. It's not perfect but when you know how to art direct the process the results speak for themselves.

I broke down the whole process on The Sketch Lab. Link to the episode in the comments below.

#AIVideo #AIFilmmaking #Claude #Seedance #PromptEngineering #CreativeAI #GenerativeAI #TheSketchLab
